description: CompositionBlack kurta made of a blended fabric, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck, three quarter embroidered sleeves with piping and beading, embroidered design, beading around the neck and above the hem and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold water using a mild detergentCrafted from soft fabric, this kurta from aneri is sure to offer exemplary comfort. Team it with leggings, sandals and chunky ethnic earrings.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
